gallery.title: Our

testimonials.title: What Our
testimonials.subtitle: Don't just take our word for it - hear from our successful graduates

reviews.name: Rahul Sharma
reviews.text: The training program at Laptian completely transformed my career. The hands-on approach and expert instructors gave me the confidence to start my own laptop repair business.

reviews.name: Priya Patel
reviews.text: Best investment I ever made! The curriculum is comprehensive, covering everything from basic troubleshooting to advanced motherboard repair. Highly recommended!

reviews.name: Amit Kumar
reviews.text: Started with zero knowledge and now running my own successful service center. The placement support and industry connections make all the difference.

reviews.name: Sneha Desai
reviews.text: The practical skills I learned here are invaluable. Real laptops, real problems, real solutions. This is not just theory - it's industry-ready training.

reviews.name: Vikram Singh
reviews.text: The certification opened so many doors for me. Clients trust my work because of the Laptian badge. Worth every penny and every hour spent learning.

reviews.name: Anjali Nair
reviews.text: Instructors are industry veterans who share real-world insights. The course equipped me with skills that immediately added value to my employer.

placements.title: Excellent
placements.subtitle: Our students are placed in leading laptop service centers and tech companies

successStories.title: Rohan placed at Dell Service Center
successStories.description: Starting package: ₹28,000/month • Within 2 weeks of course completion

successStories.title: Neha started her own repair shop

courses.title: Our
courses.subtitle: Choose the program that fits your career goals

items.title: Basic Laptop Repair
items.description: Learn fundamental laptop repair skills including hardware troubleshooting, component replacement, and basic diagnostics.

items.title: Advanced Motherboard Repair
items.description: Master complex motherboard-level repairs, circuit analysis, and component-level troubleshooting techniques.

items.title: Professional Certification Course
items.description: Comprehensive training covering all aspects of laptop repair with industry-recognized certification and placement support.

otherServices.title: Additional
otherServices.subtitle: We go beyond training to ensure your complete success

items.title: Industry Certifications
items.description: Get certified by leading brands like Dell, HP, and Lenovo. Boost your credibility and career prospects.

items.title: Workshop Access
items.description: Practice on real equipment after class hours. Full access to our state-of-the-art workshop facilities.

items.title: Business Setup Guidance
items.description: Learn how to start and run your own repair business. From licensing to customer acquisition.

items.title: Tool & Equipment Rental
items.description: Rent professional repair tools and equipment at student-friendly rates for your practice.

items.title: Lifetime Mentorship
items.description: Get ongoing support from our experts even after course completion. We're here to help you succeed.

items.title: Updated Course Material
items.description: Access to latest repair manuals, schematics, and video tutorials. Stay updated with new technologies.

cta.heading: Ready to Start Your Journey?
cta.subtitle: Join thousands of successful technicians who started their career with us
